basic_details.job_title: ICAR CIRCOT Young Professional I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Central Institute for Research on Cotton Technology (ICAR CIRCOT)
basic_details.short_information: Central Institute for Research on Cotton Technology (ICAR CIRCOT) Young Professional I Notification 2026 has been released on 22-05-2026 on the official website https://www.circot.res.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ICAR CIRCOT Young Professional I Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged 21 to 45 years who have Graduate or Diploma in Engineering/Technology are eligible to apply for these Young Professional I vacancies. The walk-in interview for ICAR CIRCOT Young Professional I Recruitment 2026 is scheduled on 22-05-2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF a

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Relaxation as per GOI rules for reserved candidates.

qualification.details: Young Professional I : Essential: Graduate or Diploma in Engineering/Technology. Desirable: Working experience in the relevant field from recognized institute/laboratories.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the ICAR CIRCOT recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the ICAR CIRCOT recruitment is Young Professional-I (YP-I).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Young Professional-I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Young Professional-I post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: The essential educational qualification is a Graduate or Diploma in Engineering/Technology.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Young Professional-I post?
faq.answer: The age limit is between 21 years and 45 years, with relaxation as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional-I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 30,000/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q6. How can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply by attending a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the date of the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be held on 22-05-2026.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category.

faq.question: Q9. What is the project duration?
faq.answer: The project duration is till 31-03-2027.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the location of the ICAR CIRCOT?
faq.answer: The ICAR CIRCOT is located in Nagpur, Maharashtra.
